query: SELECT id, status, dataOrigin, createdAt FROM quotations WHERE dataOrigin = 'system' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT id, status, dataOrigin, createdAt FROM quotations WHERE dataOrigin = 'system' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
